wiki.summary: Death By MP3 is the 9th track of slayr’s breakthrough mixtape Half Blood, it was formerly the 10th track when Power 4 was still on the album before getting removed due to sample clearance issues. It still remains the 10th track on Soundcloud and Youtube. “Death By MP3” by slayr was produced by slayr & waera. slayr released “Death By MP3” on November 5, 2025 Read more on Last.fm.
